name: single year_offset with rate_type
description: Test case for single year_offset with rate_type
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.30 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 2.25 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 0.48 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.43 ELSE 0 END), 2) as weighted_opportunity_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457" as (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0), "t7f6e791612c50cd93a2a6c17c6432976" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.30 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 2.25 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 0.48 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.43 ELSE 0 END), 2) as weighted_opportunity_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df" as (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0) select "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "te70f12f316e28f29e682d081b42501b8"."v" AS "player_keeptradecut_value_0", CAST(t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c.weighted_opportunity_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "weighted_opportunity_from_plays_0", CAST(t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.fantasy_points_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_0", CAST(t7f6e791612c50cd93a2a6c17c6432976.weighted_opportunity_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "weighted_opportunity_from_plays_1", CAST(t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df.fantasy_points_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_1", "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."year", "player"."pos" from "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" and t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.year = t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df.year + 1 left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 left join "opening_days" on "opening_days"."year" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."year" left join "keeptradecut_rankings" as "te70f12f316e28f29e682d081b42501b8" on "te70f12f316e28f29e682d081b42501b8"."pid" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" and "te70f12f316e28f29e682d081b42501b8"."qb" = 2 and "te70f12f316e28f29e682d081b42501b8"."type" = 1 and "te70f12f316e28f29e682d081b42501b8"."d" = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', opening_days.opening_day) + interval '0 year'))::integer and opening_days.year = (t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df.year) left join "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c" on "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."pid" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" and t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c.year = t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df.year and t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c.year IN (2023,2022,2021,2020) left join "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457" on "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."pid" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" and t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year = t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df.year and t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year IN (2023,2022,2021,2020) left join "t7f6e791612c50cd93a2a6c17c6432976" on "t7f6e791612c50cd93a2a6c17c6432976"."pid" = "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" and t7f6e791612c50cd93a2a6c17c6432976.year = t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df.year + 1 where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "te70f12f316e28f29e682d081b42501b8"."v", "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."fantasy_points_from_plays", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "t7f6e791612c50cd93a2a6c17c6432976"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."fantasy_points_from_plays", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."year", "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 12 DESC NULLS LAST, "t4730ad40b8b6828fa14c5dee9afb11df"."pid" asc limit 500
